use_cases: Testing REST API endpoints with configurable HTTP methods and URLs
Managing request headers, query parameters, path variables, and body content
Parsing cURL commands into structured API configurations
Viewing and analyzing API test responses
Building and documenting API integrations in developer dashboards
ai_summary: A comprehensive API playground component for testing REST endpoints with support for multiple HTTP methods, configurable headers, query parameters, path variables, and request bodies. Features resizable panel layouts, cURL command parsing, and live API testing with response display.
